text.title: Contract-First Development Worked Examples
text.summary: Worked example: paginated Resource API from blank repo to merged spec with codegen and diff gate.

example.title: Payments resource API — first release
example.narrative: Greenfield payments service. Two consumers: web FE (TS) and mobile (Swift+Kotlin). Decisions captured in ADR: bearer JWT, RFC7807 error envelope, cursor pagination via `?limit&offset`. Author starts from `templates/openapi-scaffold.yaml`, renames `Resource` to `Payment`, adds `status` enum, `amount` minor-unit integer, idempotency-key header. All operations get operationIds (`listPayments`, `createPayment`, `getPayment`, `voidPayment`). Spectral lints clean on second pass. PR review surfaces missing `409 Conflict` on idempotency-key replay → spec updated. oasdiff against `main` (empty) shows additive-only. info.version set to `1.0.0`. openapi-generator emits TS axios client + Swift Alamofire client + Kotlin retrofit client into `gen/` dirs in CI. Prism mock spun up on dev. Merge ships behind feature flag. Two weeks later, `voidPayment` adds optional `reason` field — MINOR bump to `1.1.0`, oasdiff confirms additive.
example.artifact: openapi.yaml + spectral.yaml + check-spec-drift.sh, plus generated TS/Swift/Kotlin clients reproducible from spec.
